welcome.faculty: Faculty of Physics and Applied Computer Science
welcome.systemLabel: A comprehensive system for managing measurement equipment
welcome.conciseDescription: Equipment, location and loan records in one place.
welcome.title: Integrated Measuring Apparatus Management System
welcome.subtitle: AGH University of Science and Technology in Kraków
welcome.description: A comprehensive logistical and inventory platform dedicated to faculty staff and students. Provides full control over hardware database, precise location, and booking workflows.
welcome.card1Desc: Instant access to device parameters, calibration dates, and assigned supervisors.
welcome.card2Desc: Scan device labels via smartphone or hardware scanners to verify locations or report technical issues instantly.
welcome.card3Desc: Granular asset tracking from main university buildings (e.g., D10, D11) down to exact rooms, cabinets, and shelves.
welcome.card4Desc: From standard multi-step approval flows to flexible trust-based assignments and asynchronous checkouts.

categoryManager.title: Category Hierarchy Management
